mapper.sql: COALESCE( (SELECT CONVERT(s.departure_city USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci FROM ticket_order_segment s WHERE s.order_id=o.id ORDER BY s.segment_no LIMIT 1), CONVERT(da.city USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci

COALESCE( (SELECT CONVERT(s.arrival_city USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci FROM ticket_order_segment s WHERE s.order_id=o.id ORDER BY s.segment_no DESC LIMIT 1), CONVERT(aa.city USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS period, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS activeOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(op_cnt.cnt), 0) AS passengerCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0.00) AS revenue FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_passenger GROUP BY order_id ) op_cnt ON o.id = op_cnt.order_id WHERE o.status IN () AND o.pay_time >= #{startDateTime} AND o.pay_time < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY period

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.pay_time, '%Y-%m') AS period, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS activeOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(op_cnt.cnt), 0) AS passengerCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0.00) AS revenue FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_passenger GROUP BY order_id ) op_cnt ON o.id = op_cnt.order_id WHERE o.status IN () AND o.pay_time >= #{startDateTime} AND o.pay_time < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.pay_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period

SELECT combined.departure_city AS departureCity, combined.arrival_city AS arrivalCity, CONCAT(combined.departure_city, ' - ', combined.arrival_city) AS routeLabel, COALESCE(SUM(combined.active_order_count), 0) AS activeOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(combined.passenger_count), 0) AS passengerCount, COALESCE(SUM(combined.revenue), 0.00) AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(combined.refund_amount), 0.00) AS refundAmount, COALESCE(SUM(combined.revenue), 0.00) - COALESCE(SUM(combined.refund_amount), 0.00) AS netRevenue FROM (
SELECT AS departure_city, AS arrival_city, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS active_order_count, COALESCE(SUM(op_cnt.cnt), 0) AS passenger_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0.00) AS revenue, 0.00 AS refund_amount FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_passenger GROUP BY order_id ) op_cnt ON o.id = op_cnt.order_id WHERE o.status IN () AND o.pay_time >= #{startDateTime} AND o.pay_time < #{endDateTime} AND (f.airline_id = #{airlineId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ticket_order_segment s JOIN flight sf ON sf.id=s.flight_id WHERE s.order_id=o.id AND sf.airline_id=#{airlineId})) AND = #{departureCity} AND = #{arrivalCity} GROUP BY departure_city, arrival_city
UNION ALL
SELECT AS departure_city, AS arrival_city, 0 AS active_order_count, 0 AS passenger_count, 0.00 AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(r.refund_amount), 0.00) AS refund_amount FROM refund_record r JOIN ticket_order o ON r.order_id = o.id JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id WHERE r.created_at >= #{startDateTime} AND r.created_at < #{endDateTime} AND r.status = 'SUCCESS' AND (f.airline_id = #{airlineId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ticket_order_segment s JOIN flight sf ON sf.id=s.flight_id WHERE s.order_id=o.id AND sf.airline_id=#{airlineId})) AND = #{departureCity} AND = #{arrivalCity} GROUP BY departure_city, arrival_city ) combined GROUP BY combined.departure_city, combined.arrival_city ORDER BY netRevenue DESC, activeOrderCount DESC, routeLabel ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.id AS flightId, f.flight_no AS flightNo, al.name AS airlineName, CONCAT(da.city, ' - ', aa.city) AS routeLabel, f.departure_time AS departureTime, f.total_seats AS totalSeats, COALESCE(sold.cnt, 0) AS soldPassengerCount, CASE WHEN f.total_seats = 0 THEN 0.00 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(sold.cnt, 0) * 100.0 / f.total_seats, 2) END AS loadFactorPercent FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sold_segments.flight_id, SUM(sold_segments.cnt) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT o.flight_id, COUNT(op.id) AS cnt FROM ticket_order o JOIN order_passenger op ON o.id = op.order_id WHERE o.status IN () AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ticket_order_segment s WHERE s.order_id=o.id) GROUP BY o.flight_id UNION ALL SELECT s.flight_id, COUNT(sp.id) AS cnt FROM ticket_order o JOIN ticket_order_segment s ON s.order_id=o.id JOIN order_segment_passenger sp ON sp.order_segment_id=s.id WHERE o.status IN () GROUP BY s.flight_id ) sold_segments GROUP BY sold_segments.flight_id ) sold ON f.id = sold.flight_id WHERE f.departure_time >= #{startDateTime} AND f.departure_time < #{endDateTime} AND f.airline_id = #{airlineId} AND da.city = #{departureCity} AND aa.city = #{arrivalCity} ORDER BY f.departure_time LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS period, COUNT(*) AS refundCount, COALESCE(SUM(r.refund_amount), 0.00) AS refundAmount FROM refund_record r WHERE r.created_at >= #{startDateTime} AND r.created_at < #{endDateTime} AND r.status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY period

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS period, COUNT(*) AS refundCount, COALESCE(SUM(r.refund_amount), 0.00) AS refundAmount FROM refund_record r WHERE r.created_at >= #{startDateTime} AND r.created_at < #{endDateTime} AND r.status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period

SELECT COUNT(*) AS submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPaymentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waitingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refundedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN w.status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expiredCount, COALESCE(SUM(w.pay_amount), 0.00) AS payAmount, COALESCE(SUM(w.refund_amount), 0.00) AS refundAmount FROM waitlist_order w JOIN flight f ON w.flight_id = f.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id WHERE w.created_at >= #{startDateTime} AND w.created_at < #{endDateTime} AND f.airline_id = #{airlineId} AND da.city = #{departureCity} AND aa.city = #{arrivalCity}
